text.title: ai-native-product-development Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-native-product-development as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using "latest" or "best available" as the model version in a product spec or config.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vendor model updates change AI-native feature behavior silently. Without a pinned version and a regression test, production quality degrades without notice.

failure-mode.description: Deferring bias testing to post-launch because "the model provider handles fairness."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The product owner is responsible for AI outcomes in the product context, regardless of the model provider's general fairness work. Bias in your specific use case and data distribution is your obligation to assess.
